data.body: Done. /fake/dso->/fake/rebar in test_invariants.py + test_at_most_one_invariant.py (+ 'dso not on PATH'->'rebar not on PATH', legacy-CLI comments); stale 'dso ticket ...' comments updated (test_conflict_filing_deferred, test_apply_batch_drift_tolerance); 'DSO skills'/'DSO agent-routing' comments reworded; non_dso_mut/outbound_differ_dsoid/*_dso_status_* renames; dso-slug comments in test_reducer_links.
